ops.text: Make Silence Tripwire toggle suppress the DNS (SYSTEM) overlay to prevent overlapping blocks

operations.message: ✨ AI: The patch intended to modify logic related to launching LockdownActivity but the anchor context was not found in onAccessibilityEvent. Found similar l...
operations.explanation: The patch intended to modify logic related to launching LockdownActivity but the anchor context was not found in onAccessibilityEvent. Found similar logic in startMonitoring on lines 459-465.

ops.text: Fix priority in LockManager to respect silence toggle before DNS enforcement
